description.ko: 고투명 크리스탈 프리즘을 통과하는 백색광이 선명한 무지개색으로 분산되는 찰나를 포착하여 광학 물리학의 섬세한 아름다움을 시각화했습니다.
description.en: A stunning visualization of white light splitting into its constituent colors as it passes through a high-clarity crystal prism, capturing the delicate beauty of optical physics.

prompt: A macro photograph of a sharp triangular glass prism placed on a dark reflective surface. A singular beam of white light enters the prism and exits as a vibrant, wide spectral rainbow. High chromatic aberration, sharp focus on the internal light dispersion, caustic lighting patterns, crystalline texture, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere.
